creator: yoichi@eken.phys.nagoya-u.ac.jp
text:
a slave port japanese/aterm and a little fixes for x11/aterm

For japanese people, kanji sapport(which is not enabled in x11/aterm)
is very useful and needed. To enable the feature, you have only to 
add --enable-kanji to CONFIGURE_ARGS. My fix enables the feature
of kanji support in ports/japanese/aterm and leave the result of 
ports/x11/aterm unchanged.

(Insted of this fix, adding --enable-kanji to default CONFIGURE_ARGS
of x11/aterm is also satisfactory for me, if there are no bad reaction
by that.)
